
---

## 🔥 **.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md**

```markdown
---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for AnimeMultiFlix
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''

---

## 🎯 Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the problem is -->
Ex: I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 🚀 Describe the solution you'd like
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen -->

## 🎨 Describe alternatives you've considered
<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

## 💡 Use Case
<!-- Describe the use case for this feature -->

## 📊 Feature Impact
<!-- How would this feature benefit users? -->
- [ ] New functionality
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Security improvement
- [ ] Accessibility improvement
- [ ] Developer experience

## 🎯 Target Users
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Free users
- [ ] Premium users
- [ ] Admin users
- [ ] Specific user group (please specify):

## 🔧 Technical Considerations
<!-- Any technical details you'd like to share -->

## 📱 Platform Impact
- [ ] Affects Web
- [ ] Affects Mobile (Android)
- [ ] Affects Mobile (iOS)
- [ ] Affects Desktop App
- [ ] Affects TV App

## 🌐 Localization
- [ ] Requires new translations
- [ ] No localization impact

## 🏷️ Component
<!-- Check which component(s) this feature affects -->
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Mobile
- [ ] Database
- [ ] API
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Video Player
- [ ] Voice Chat
- [ ] Watch Party
- [ ] Groups/Chat
- [ ] Payment/Premium
- [ ] Admin Panel

## 📝 Mockups / References
<!-- Add any mockups, designs, or reference links here -->

## ✅ Definition of Done
- [ ] Feature implemented
- [ ] Tests added
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Performance impact assessed
- [ ] Security review completed
- [ ] UX review completed

---

**Thank you for your suggestion! 🎬**
